main.summary: Configures handlers for CliWrap Command events.
main.remarks: Provides set-once delegates that are invoked for observed Command events.

property.name: OnStarted
property.returns: Delegate invoked when the Command starts.

property.name: OnStdOut
property.returns: Delegate invoked for standard output events.

property.name: OnStdErr
property.returns: Delegate invoked for standard error events.

property.name: OnExited
property.returns: Delegate invoked when the Command exits.
